raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>2024 an unauthorized charge was made on my account for the amount of {$1.00}, I saw this on the Citi mobile app, I disputed the transaction on XX/XX/year>2024 and was immediately credited the {$1.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX I saw another unauthorized transaction on my account made on XX/XX/year>2024 for the amount of {$320.00}, I tried to dispute on the citi mobile application and could not do it, I called the XXXX and reported the unauthorized transaction the Spanish speaking agent advised to immediately destroy the card and citibank costco anywhere bank would send a new card in the mail. Days passed and an e-mail was received to call back citibank and speak to an agent in the fraud center. The agents do not speak XXXX and a translator was used on the call that confused more than it resolved. After being asked questions about the use of the card, the agent said the decision would be sent out in the mail. I confidently thought that citibank costco anywhere card would credit my account for that unauthorized transaction. I received a letter in the mail stating that I was responsible for paying this unauthorized transaction because I provided my account number when the transaction was made. I did not make this transaction, I have previously made purchased with this merchant, the last being in XX/XX/year>2024. I called XXXX and asked why I would not received a credit for a transaction I did not make. I was transferred to about 4 to 5 agents no one would help me, while having a translator on the line. I was treated like an idiot, I felt lost and discriminated because I could not communicate with the agents, and the translator only made things worse for me. I clearly stated to the translator please I need the {$320.00} credited to my account, I did not make this transaction, the call lasted 49 minutes and there was no resolution to the call. The dispute was remade on XX/XX/year>2024, and there has been no credit to my account. The letter I received states that I will be reported to the credit agencies if I don't pay an unauthorized transaction made on my account, I feel threatened and coerced to pay something I did not authorize on my account, just to protect my credit and because Citibank Costco Anywhere card refuses to help me as a consumer of their credit card services.
